text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day has finally come for the Arima Kinen, the
last big race of the senior year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature is no longer the timid girl she once
was. Determined to shine brighter than anyone
else...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She sets out for the Arima Kinen, where great
runners await her—Tokai Teio among them.
